title: Fix React hooks violation causing node crash on viewport resize
description: CRITICAL bug found via live browser testing: When viewport resizes (desktop→mobile or back), ALL node components crash with 'Rendered fewer/more hooks than expected'. Root cause: node components have conditional hook calls that depend on viewport size — e.g., a useViewportStore hook that conditionally calls useMemo/useCallback based on LOD tier. This violates React's rules of hooks. Nodes permanently crash until page reload. Affects BaseNode.tsx and all 73 node wrappers that delegate to it.
acceptanceCriteria: Resizing viewport from 1280px to 375px and back does NOT crash any node components
No 'Rendered fewer/more hooks' errors in console during resize
All 6 LOD-dependent behaviors still work correctly (dot, simplified, full views)
Error boundary recovery works — crashed nodes can be retried without reload

title: Fix mobile layout — sidebar takes over viewport, canvas inaccessible
description: CRITICAL bug found via live browser testing at 375px width: The ComponentPalette sidebar takes over the entire viewport. Canvas, toolbar, and properties panel are not visible. No hamburger menu exists, no way to collapse sidebar. The app is completely unusable on mobile. Need responsive layout: sidebar collapses to hamburger/sheet on mobile, canvas gets full width, toolbar repositions to bottom.
acceptanceCriteria: At 375px width, canvas is visible and interactive
Sidebar collapses to a hamburger menu or bottom sheet on screens <768px
Toolbar repositions to be accessible on mobile
Properties panel accessible via a swipe or tap gesture
All core flows work: load template, add node, run simulation

title: Fix missing font files returning 404 (geist-sans.woff2, geist-mono.woff2)
description: HIGH bug found via live browser testing: GET /fonts/geist-sans.woff2 and GET /fonts/geist-mono.woff2 both return 404. Next.js serves fonts from /_next/static/media/ but CSS/config references /fonts/ path. This causes fallback to system fonts, inconsistent typography across platforms.
acceptanceCriteria: Both font files load without 404 errors
Typography renders consistently using Geist font family
No font-related console errors or network failures

title: Fix OnboardingOverlay SSR hydration mismatch
description: HIGH bug found via live browser testing: OnboardingOverlay renders role='status' with class='sr-only' on server but role='dialog' with class='fixed inset-0 z-[100]' on client. Classic SSR/client state divergence — overlay checks localStorage/window to decide rendering. Fix: use useEffect to determine client-only state, render null or matching skeleton on server.
acceptanceCriteria: No hydration mismatch errors in console on initial page load
OnboardingOverlay appears correctly for first-time users
OnboardingOverlay stays hidden for returning users
SSR output matches initial client render

title: Add aria-labels to 16 unlabeled icon-only toolbar buttons
description: HIGH a11y bug found via live browser testing: 16 of 57 focusable elements in the toolbar have no aria-label, no text, and no title — screen reader users cannot identify them. These are icon-only buttons (SVG) in CanvasToolbar. Add descriptive aria-labels to every icon-only button.
acceptanceCriteria: All icon-only buttons in CanvasToolbar have descriptive aria-labels
Screen reader announces button purpose (e.g., 'Zoom in', 'Toggle minimap', 'Export design')
No unlabeled focusable elements remain in the toolbar
Canvas application role has an aria-label

title: Fix CSP report endpoint returning 400 for all reports
description: MEDIUM bug found via live browser testing: POST /api/csp-report returns 400 Bad Request for all 15 CSP violation reports. The endpoint exists but the handler is misconfigured or expects a different payload format. Additionally, one inline script (likely Next.js theme-switching) is blocked by CSP because it lacks the correct nonce.
acceptanceCriteria: POST /api/csp-report accepts and processes CSP violation reports (returns 204)
Inline theme-switching script has correct CSP nonce
No CSP-blocked scripts in console

title: Create Proximity/Location Service template (Yelp/Nearby Places)
description: CRITICAL content gap: Every major competitor (HelloInterview, DesignGurus, Codemia) has this template. It's a top FAANG interview question testing geospatial indexing (Geohash, Quadtree, S2), proximity search, ranking, and geographic data partitioning. Architex has no geospatial template despite having relevant components (mobile-client, api-gateway, database, cache, search-engine). Create template with: nodes (mobile-client, api-gw, location-service, geospatial-index, places-db, cache, search-engine), edges, learnSteps explaining geospatial indexing, simulation config.
acceptanceCriteria: Template includes 7+ nodes covering the full proximity search architecture
learnSteps explain Geohash vs Quadtree vs S2 indexing approaches
Simulation config with chaos scenarios (cache miss on cold region, DB partition hotspot)
Difficulty rating appropriate (3-4/5)
Template loads and simulates correctly

title: Create File Storage/Sync template (Dropbox/Google Drive)
description: CRITICAL content gap: One of the most common interview questions. Tests chunking, deduplication, sync conflict resolution, versioning. All major competitors have it. Create template with: web-client, mobile-client, api-gw, upload-service, storage (S3), metadata-db, dedup-service, sync-service, notification-service, CDN. learnSteps covering: chunked upload, content-addressable dedup, sync conflict resolution (OT vs CRDT), versioning strategy.
acceptanceCriteria: Template includes 8+ nodes covering upload, sync, dedup, and storage
learnSteps explain chunked upload, deduplication, and conflict resolution
Simulation config with scenarios: large file upload, concurrent edits, offline sync
Difficulty rating 3-4/5

title: Create TikTok/Short-Video Platform template
description: CRITICAL content gap: The #1 NEW interview question in 2025-2026. Tests recommendation engine + video upload pipeline + feed generation + CDN delivery + content moderation. No competitor except Codemia has a dedicated short-video template. Create with: mobile-client, api-gw, upload-service, video-transcoding, CDN, recommendation-engine, feed-service, user-db, content-moderation, analytics, message-queue. learnSteps covering: recommendation algorithms (collaborative filtering + ML ranking), video processing pipeline, feed fanout strategy.
acceptanceCriteria: Template includes 10+ nodes covering full short-video platform
learnSteps explain recommendation algorithm, video processing, and feed generation
Simulation config with scenarios: viral video spike, cold-start recommendation, content moderation delay
Difficulty rating 4/5

title: Create RAG Pipeline System Design template
description: CRITICAL content gap and FIRST-MOVER ADVANTAGE: The most asked AI system design question in 2026. No competitor has a dedicated RAG template. Architex already has llm-gateway, tool-registry, memory-fabric, and agent-orchestrator components. Create template with: web-client, api-gw, query-service, embedding-service, vector-db, document-store, llm-gateway, reranker, chunking-pipeline, ingestion-service. learnSteps covering: embedding models, vector similarity search (HNSW), chunking strategies, retrieval vs generation tradeoffs, hallucination mitigation.
acceptanceCriteria: Template includes 10+ nodes covering full RAG pipeline
learnSteps explain embedding, vector search (HNSW), chunking, and retrieval
Uses existing AI/LLM components (llm-gateway, etc.)
Simulation config with scenarios: large corpus ingestion, semantic drift, model latency spike
Difficulty rating 4/5

title: Create Multi-Region Architecture template
description: CRITICAL content gap: Asked at senior+ level at all FAANG. Tests active-active vs active-passive, cross-region replication, failover routing, data sovereignty, inter-region latency. No competitor has this. Create template with: clients (US, EU, Asia), DNS (Route53 with geo-routing), CDN (regional), api-gw (per region), app-servers (per region), primary-db (US), replica-db (EU, Asia), cache (per region), message-queue (cross-region sync). learnSteps covering: active-active vs active-passive tradeoffs, cross-region replication lag, data residency/GDPR, failover strategies, cost of egress.
acceptanceCriteria: Template includes 12+ nodes across 3 geographic regions
learnSteps explain active-active/passive, replication lag, GDPR implications
Simulation config with scenarios: region failure, cross-region latency spike, data sovereignty violation
Visual layout groups nodes by region (US, EU, Asia)
Difficulty rating 5/5

title: Create Vector Database System Design template
description: EMERGING content gap: Core AI infrastructure with 30%+ enterprise adoption in 2026. Tests HNSW indexing, embedding pipelines, approximate nearest neighbor, storage-compute separation, hybrid search (vector + full-text). Create template with: api-gw, embedding-service, vector-index (HNSW), metadata-store, object-storage, query-router, cache, monitoring. learnSteps: HNSW algorithm, IVF vs HNSW tradeoffs, quantization, hybrid search, pgvector vs dedicated solutions.
acceptanceCriteria: Template includes 8+ nodes covering vector DB architecture
learnSteps explain HNSW, quantization, and hybrid search
Simulation config with scenarios: high-dimensional query latency, index rebuild, memory pressure
Difficulty rating 4/5

title: Create Google Maps / Navigation System template
description: CRITICAL content gap: Frequent FAANG interview question. Tests geospatial data, graph algorithms (Dijkstra/A*), tile rendering, ETA computation, real-time traffic. Create template with: mobile-client, api-gw, routing-service, tile-server, traffic-service, geocoding-service, search-engine, database (road graph), cache, CDN (map tiles). learnSteps: road graph representation, shortest path with real-time traffic weights, tile-based rendering at zoom levels, ETA computation.
acceptanceCriteria: Template includes 10+ nodes covering navigation architecture
learnSteps explain graph-based routing, tile rendering, ETA computation
Simulation config with scenarios: traffic jam re-routing, tile cache miss, geocoding failure
Difficulty rating 4-5/5

title: Create Airbnb/Marketplace Platform template
description: CRITICAL content gap: Commonly asked at Airbnb, Amazon, Meta. Tests search ranking, booking with distributed locks, pricing algorithms, review system, dual-sided marketplace. Create template with: web-client, api-gw, search-service, listing-service, booking-service, payment-gateway, review-service, pricing-service, database, cache, message-queue, notification-service. learnSteps: two-sided marketplace design, search ranking, distributed booking locks, dynamic pricing.
acceptanceCriteria: Template includes 10+ nodes covering marketplace architecture
learnSteps explain marketplace dynamics, booking locks, search ranking
Simulation config with scenarios: double-booking race condition, search ranking bias, payment failure
Difficulty rating 4/5

title: Create Agentic AI System Design template
description: EMERGING gap — hottest topic in 2026 (CNCF Agentics Day at KubeCon). Architex already has agent-orchestrator, tool-registry, memory-fabric, safety-mesh, llm-gateway components. Create template with: web-client, api-gw, agent-orchestrator, llm-gateway, tool-registry, memory-fabric, safety-mesh, vector-db, function-executor, monitoring. learnSteps: ReAct loops, orchestrator-worker pattern, tool calling, memory management, guardrails/safety, multi-agent coordination.
acceptanceCriteria: Template uses existing AI/LLM components (agent-orchestrator, tool-registry, etc.)
learnSteps explain ReAct pattern, tool calling, memory, and safety layers
Simulation config with scenarios: agent loop, tool timeout, safety violation, hallucination cascade
Difficulty rating 5/5

title: Create Flash Sale / High-Concurrency System template
description: EMERGING gap: Tests distributed locks, inventory management, exactly-once semantics under extreme write load. Asked at Amazon, Alibaba, Shopify. Create template with: web-client, cdn, api-gw, rate-limiter, order-service, inventory-service (with distributed lock), payment-gateway, message-queue, cache (with TTL), database. learnSteps: optimistic vs pessimistic locking, exactly-once inventory decrement, queue-based order processing, circuit breaker under load.
acceptanceCriteria: Template includes 10+ nodes handling flash sale architecture
learnSteps explain distributed locking, exactly-once semantics, load shedding
Simulation config with scenarios: 100x traffic spike, inventory race condition, payment timeout
Difficulty rating 4/5

title: Create LLM Serving Infrastructure template
description: EMERGING gap: Production AI infrastructure — vLLM, continuous batching, PagedAttention, KV cache management, disaggregated prefill/decode. Create template with: api-gw, rate-limiter, model-router, prefill-worker, decode-worker, kv-cache, model-registry, gpu-cluster, monitoring, autoscaler. learnSteps: continuous batching, PagedAttention, disaggregated serving, KV cache eviction, model routing strategies (cost vs latency).
acceptanceCriteria: Template includes 10+ nodes covering LLM serving stack
learnSteps explain continuous batching, PagedAttention, disaggregated serving
Simulation config with scenarios: GPU saturation, cold model load, KV cache overflow
Difficulty rating 5/5
